name: homura-todo-app
description: Todo app example showcasing Homura::Model ORM features

scripts.build: pnpm run bundle:ruby && pnpm run build:mruby
scripts.dev:e2e: pnpm run bundle:ruby && pnpm run db:migrate:local && wrangler dev --local --port 8793
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test e2e/todo-app.spec.ts --config e2e/playwright.todo-app.config.ts
